## Problem

What workflow are you trying to improve?

## Proposed CLI Design

```bash
grok-cli ...
```

## Expected Output

Describe the human-readable output or JSON fields you expect.

## Source Or Reference

If this is based on xAI documentation, SDK behavior, or another tool, link it here.

## Testing Notes

How should this be tested? Include expected validation or stub-server behavior when possible.
